summary: Fixed Android navigation bug and verified all components. All 11 acceptance criteria met.

changes.description: Added missing onMyReservationsClick parameter to LotsListScreen navigation
Created comprehensive verification report documenting all acceptance criteria, build status, and deployment instructions

met: ESP32 reads sensors and sends to backend
Backend receives sensor data and updates slot status
Admin can create parking lots and slots
Admin can assign owner to parking lot
Owner sees their parking lot statistics

next_steps: Project is complete and ready for demonstration
